description: Style Note This lotto shoe is the perfect response to Indian weather - lightweight and easy on the pocket! This shoe offers a comfy ride and is perfect for fun fridays at work. You can also use this shoe for an early morning jog in the park. Product Details Round toed white shoe with perforations on the upper and central lace-ups Padded tongue and inner Foamy rubber midsole TPU outsole with herringbone grooves and a pivot point at the big toe region Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
